splits.title: The Vagaries of an Autumn Day
splits.author: Lettie B. H. Rich
splits.start_boundary: The Vagaries of an Autumn Day By

files.notes: This file contains two distinct pieces: a substantial article on religious training by Dr. Joseph F. Merrill, followed by a short poem by Lettie B. H. Rich. The article discusses the importance of religious education in modern society, while the poem describes the changing weather of an autumn day.
